title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Pizza Hut India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Pizza Hut India
jsonLd.description:
Pizza Hut India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Hyderabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Pizza Hut India:
Pizza Hut India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pizza Hut India!
